name: Writers Guild
summary: Publishing, storytelling, research, and public sensemaking across the Greenpill network.
description: The Writers Guild supports essays, field reports, translations, publishing workflows, and editorial work across chapters and guilds. Public sources show Greenpill's Paragraph publication, the long-running podcast, Garden writing needs, and a network-wide push toward clearer public knowledge infrastructure.
oneliner: Stories, translations, field reports, and public knowledge work for the network.

outputs.label: Field reports
outputs.summary: Chapter and guild updates that turn local work into public learning.

outputs.label: Translations
outputs.summary: Translation work around Greenpill books and chapter resources, including Brasil's Portuguese work.

outputs.label: Publication surfaces
outputs.summary: Greenpill Paragraph, podcast notes, newsletter copy, and public Hub threads.

outputs.label: Tooling research
outputs.summary: The Carbon Copy collaboration explores how ReFi communities use Web3 tools.

mandateParagraphs: The Writers Guild makes the network legible. It turns local experiments, chapter practice, books, podcasts, and builder work into public stories people can reuse.
The launch website should show stories as proof of activity and learning, not as a generic blog feed.
Draft newsletters and internal Drive notes should stay internal until a steward approves them for public publication.

cadence.summary: Public sources confirm Writers Guild activity and publication surfaces, but exact cadence needs steward confirmation before launch.

principles.title: Source-backed storytelling
principles.body: Every story should link to public proof or a steward-approved publication source.

principles.title: Field-first writing
principles.body: Lead with real chapter, guild, and program updates instead of abstract claims.

principles.title: No private drafts in public content
principles.body: Newsletter drafts, Drive docs, raw notes, and submission data stay out of public Keystatic until approved.

media.imageAlt: Greenpill publication artwork used for the public Paragraph archive.

seo.title: Writers Guild · Greenpill Network
seo.description: The Greenpill Writers Guild supports field reports, publishing, translations, and public knowledge work across the network.
